# Golden file: secrets.vault pack
format: v1
---
# D1: disable secrets engine
command: vault secrets disable secret/
decision: Deny
severity: Critical
confidence: High
pack: secrets.vault
rule: vault-secrets-disable
---
# D2: disable auth method
command: vault auth disable github
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: secrets.vault
rule: vault-auth-disable
---
# D3: revoke token
command: vault token revoke root
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: secrets.vault
rule: vault-token-revoke
---
# D4: delete policy
command: vault policy delete prod
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: secrets.vault
rule: vault-policy-delete
---
# D5: disable audit sink
command: vault audit disable file
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: secrets.vault
rule: vault-audit-disable
---
# Safe: token lookup
command: vault token lookup
decision: Allow
